name: web-search
description: Web search tool — search the internet via DuckDuckGo, Brave, Tavily, or SearXNG

provider.description: Search provider: duckduckgo, brave, tavily, or searxng

maxResults.description: Maximum number of search results to return (1-10)

braveApiKey.description: Brave Search API key (required when provider=brave)

searxngInstanceUrl.description: SearXNG instance URL (e.g. https://searx.example.com) (required when provider=searxng)
